pricing.heading: Rolls-Royce Rental Dubai Price: Transparent Daily, Hourly, Weekly & Monthly Rates
pricing.quickAnswer: Rolls-Royce rental in Dubai starts from AED 3,800/day (Ghost), chauffeur-driven or self-drive, with free delivery across Dubai.
keyFacts: Daily rates (AED): Ghost 3,800; Wraith 5,000; Dawn 5,500; Phantom 5,800; Cullinan 6,500; Spectre 7,500.
Hourly hire from AED 800 with a 2-hour minimum; discounted weekly and monthly long-term rates available.
Every rental includes free delivery across Dubai and the choice of professional chauffeur or self-drive for qualifying renters.
Book 24/7 on WhatsApp +971 55 816 4922; service in English, Arabic and Russian by Rolls-Royce Dubai (Naqra FZE).
body: Our Rolls-Royce rental Dubai price is clear and upfront, with no hidden fees. Daily rates start from AED 3,800 for the Ghost, AED 5,000 for the Wraith and AED 5,500 for the Dawn, while the Phantom is AED 5,800, the Cullinan AED 6,500 and the all-electric Spectre AED 7,500. Every booking includes a professional chauffeur and free delivery across Dubai.

Choose the term that fits your plans: hourly hire for a city tour, daily for a special occasion, or discounted weekly and monthly rates for longer stays. Whether you need an airport transfer to DXB, a wedding car in Downtown Dubai, or a Cullinan for the weekend, book in minutes over WhatsApp with multilingual support, 24/7.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to rent a Rolls-Royce in Dubai per day?
faqs.answer: Daily rates start at AED 3,800 for the Ghost, with the Wraith at AED 5,000, Dawn AED 5,500, Phantom AED 5,800, Cullinan AED 6,500 and the electric Spectre at AED 7,500 per day. Every rate includes a chauffeur, insurance and free delivery in Dubai.

faqs.question: Which is the cheapest Rolls-Royce to rent in Dubai?
faqs.answer: The Rolls-Royce Ghost is the most affordable model at AED 3,800 per day. Weekly bookings save about 15% and monthly bookings save up to 30%, making longer rentals the cheapest way to drive a Rolls-Royce in Dubai.

faqs.question: How much is a Rolls-Royce with a driver in Dubai?
faqs.answer: All daily rates already include a professional multilingual chauffeur. For dedicated full-day or hourly chauffeur service the rate is shown at booking, and you can confirm an exact quote on WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922.

faqs.question: Is delivery included in the Rolls-Royce rental price in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. Free delivery and collection are included anywhere within Dubai. Deliveries to other emirates are available on request for an additional fee, confirmed before you book.

faqs.question: Are Rolls-Royce rental prices in Dubai shown in AED, and are they all-inclusive?
faqs.answer: Yes, all prices are quoted in UAE Dirhams (AED) and include the chauffeur, comprehensive insurance and 24/7 support. A refundable security deposit applies; there are no hidden fees beyond extra mileage above the daily allowance.

faqs.question: What is the Rolls-Royce rent price in Dubai?
faqs.answer: The Rolls-Royce rent price in Dubai starts at AED 3,800/day for the Ghost, with fully transparent rates across the fleet — Wraith from AED 5,000, Dawn 5,500, Phantom 5,800 and Cullinan 6,500 — plus hourly, weekly and monthly options.
